headline: Bank OZK Q2 Earnings Beat Estimates on Higher Fee Income, Shares Fall
summary: OZK's Q2 results benefit from higher fee income and record deposits. However, shares fall as lower NII and weaker credit quality weigh on sentiment.

raw.headline: Bank OZK Q2 Earnings Beat Estimates on Higher Fee Income, Shares Fall
raw.summary: OZK's Q2 results benefit from higher fee income and record deposits. However, shares fall as lower NII and weaker credit quality weigh on sentiment.

headline: Webster Financial Q2 Earnings Miss Estimates, Expenses Rise Y/Y
summary: WBS' Q2 earnings miss estimates as higher expenses and margin pressure offset revenue growth and balance-sheet expansion.

raw.headline: Webster Financial Q2 Earnings Miss Estimates, Expenses Rise Y/Y
